meaning: n. (故事中的)恶作剧的小精灵
examples: They use small sticks and a puck.
The puck is a little like a ball.
Players try to push the puck along the bottom of a swimming pool into the other team's goal.
As the article correctly noted elsewhere, it is Daft Punk--not Daft Puck or Daft Pink.
New York didn't carry the puck into the Boston end until 1:35 had elapsed.
